results.title: PP leader blasted over 'blue regime' remark
results.description: Senators have threatened legal action against opposition leader Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut unless he apologises within three days for remarks alleging the Senate is part of a "blue regime" rooted in the 2017 Constitution, which he described as a legacy of a coup.

results.title: TRC prosecutions and investigations ground to a halt after ‘moratorium’ declared, inquiry hears

results.title: Can Huawei outpace US sanctions with its new 1.4nm chip strategy by 2031?
results.description: Huawei, which provided no independent performance data, unveiled the Tau Scaling Law, a chip design principle aimed at speeding data movement by folding and stacking chips.

results.title: Clarence B. Jones, MLK speechwriter who snuck out notes that would become 'Letter from Birmingham Jail,' dies
results.description: Clarence B. Jones, an attorney and speechwriter for Martin Luther King, Jr. who was with the late minister and civil rights activist for most of his public life, including helping to draft his famous "I Have a Dream" speech, has died.

results.title: Amir provides Amiri grant covering Hajj expenses for 180 Syrian pilgrims
results.description:
Doha, Qatar: The Amir HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani provided an Amiri grant to cover the Hajj expenses for 180 pilgrims from the brotherly Syrian Arab Republic for the year 1447 AH/2026 AD.

The Embassy of the State of Qatar in Damascus stated that "this step reflects the depth of brotherly relations and close cooperation between the two countries, and stands as an extension of the approach of support and solidarity that unites the two brotherly peoples. We ask Allah Almighty to accept the Hajj of the pilgrims, and to permanently bestow the blessing of security and brotherhood upon both brotherly countries."

results.title: Crudo Consulting Group
results.description: Los habitantes de Sicilia, en el 70 a.C., acudieron a Roma para denunciar a su gobernador, Verres. Lo acusaban de haber convertido la provincia en un negocio privado: impuestos abusivos, saqueo de obras de arte, extorsiones, compra de favores y enriquecimiento personal. Verres no gobernaba; expoliaba. Cicerón lo llevó ante los tribunales y comprendió enseguida que el verdadero problema no era solo un político corrupto, sino una sociedad que empezaba a acostumbrarse a la corrupción.

results.title: Amber Alerts just a fraction of missing children’s cases: expert
results.description: Amber Alerts get headlines, but the CEO of the Missing Children’s Society of Canada wants us to know those incidents are just a tiny fraction of missing children’s cases in Canada.

results.title: Delhiwale: The mid-summer’s Amaltas survey
